title: Pokemon Detail Validation, Derived Types, Units, and Inclusive Presentation · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs pokemon detail validation, derived types, units, and inclusive presentation from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for validated inclusive Pokemon detail card after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: Validate numeric ID or constrained canonical name and retain both requested input and resolved resource identity.
Validate ID, name, types, abilities, stats, height, weight, sprites or references, bounds, and member shapes from unknown.
Map transport fields into a readonly discriminated view that separates available, empty, and unsupported information.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex Ts Detail Identity · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 6550 during an inclusive museum learning kiosk. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate Pokemon detail JSON, derived view types, units, ordered sections, and inclusive output; the fixed PokéAPI origin and fair-use budget must remain enforced; then change one unknown JSON field, nested member, status, URL, or byte budget and re-run validation. Browser code uses pure bounded runtime models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, Node readline, host streams, signals, files, package installs, handle and load claims, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Validate numeric ID or constrained canonical name and retain both requested input and resolved resource identity.
